creator: yokota@res.otaru-uc.ac.jp
text:
databases/evolution-data-server doesn't configure when WITH_HEIMDAL
is specified. When this tag is set, configure takes argument
"--with-krb5", but it tests for "libk5crypto.so" and "libgss.so",
both of which do not exist in heimdal.

config.log is attached.
